content.text:
<think>
Looking at the chart, it shows percent of total alcohol consumption by type (beer, spirits, wine, other) for 10 countries from 1965-2015. The wine category is shown in pink/red.

Chile clearly stands out - the wine (pink/red) area dominates its chart, taking up approximately 70-80% of total alcohol consumption in the 1960s-1970s, and remaining dominant even as it declined over time. No other country in the chart comes close to Chile's wine percentage.
</think>

<answer>
Chile
</answer>
